skill.name: ai-engineer
skill.description: Build production-ready LLM applications, advanced RAG systems, and intelligent agents. Implements vector search, multimodal AI, agent orchestration, and enterprise AI integrations.
skill.summary: Expert AI engineer for building production LLM applications, RAG systems, and AI agents with vector search and multimodal capabilities.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Prompt-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis scanned 0 files (0 lines) and detected 0 potential security issues. Risk score: 0/100. This is a text-based persona prompt for AI engineering tasks with no scripts, network calls, filesystem access, or external command execution. No prompt injection attempts detected.

content.user_title: Build Production LLM Apps with AI Engineer
content.value_statement: Rapidly develop production-grade LLM applications, RAG systems, and intelligent AI agents with expert guidance on vector search, multimodal AI, and enterprise integrations.
actual_capabilities: Design and implement production RAG systems with hybrid search and reranking
Build intelligent AI agents with LangChain, LlamaIndex, and CrewAI frameworks
Integrate vector databases (Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate) for semantic search
Implement multimodal AI with vision, audio, and document processing models
Optimize LLM costs through model routing, caching, and token management
Add AI safety guardrails for prompt injection, PII detection, and content moderation
limitations: Cannot access external APIs or services without proper credentials and network configuration
Cannot execute code directly - provides code examples that users must run themselves
Cannot access private data or internal systems without explicit configuration
Model recommendations may become outdated as AI landscape evolves rapidly

use_cases.title: Enterprise Knowledge Base RAG
use_cases.description: Build a production RAG system that combines vector search with keyword matching to provide accurate answers from company documentation.
use_cases.target_user: Enterprise developers building internal knowledge management systems

use_cases.title: Customer Service AI Agent
use_cases.description: Create a multi-agent system that handles customer inquiries with escalation workflows and integration to CRM systems.
use_cases.target_user: Product teams building automated customer support solutions

use_cases.title: Document Analysis Pipeline
use_cases.description: Implement a multimodal pipeline that extracts information from PDFs, images, and tables for automated document processing.
use_cases.target_user: Data engineers building document processing workflows

prompt_templates.title: Basic RAG Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me build a basic RAG system using LangChain and Qdrant for semantic search. Include vector storage, chunking strategy, and retrieval pipeline.
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting a new RAG project from scratch

prompt_templates.title: Production RAG Optimization
prompt_templates.prompt: Improve my current RAG system with hybrid search, reranking, and query decomposition. How do I implement these patterns in production?
prompt_templates.scenario: Optimizing an existing RAG system for better accuracy

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Agent System Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a multi-agent system using CrewAI with specialized roles for research, analysis, and reporting. Include memory management and tool integration.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building a collaborative AI agent system

prompt_templates.title: Cost-Optimized LLM Pipeline
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a cost-optimized LLM inference pipeline with semantic caching, model routing based on query complexity, and budget controls.

output_examples.input: Build a production RAG system for my documentation
output_examples.output: I'll help you build a production RAG system. First, let me outline the architecture: 1) Document processing pipeline with chunking strategies, 2) Vector storage using Qdrant with HNSW indexing, 3) Retrieval with hybrid search combining vector similarity and BM25, 4) Reranking with CrossEncoder for improved relevance. Would you like me to provide implementation code for any specific component?

output_examples.input: How do I implement AI safety in my chatbot?
output_examples.output: For AI safety in production chatbots, implement these layers: 1) Input filtering with prompt injection detection, 2) PII detection and redaction using Presidio, 3) Output moderation with OpenAI Moderation API, 4) Rate limiting per user to prevent abuse. Would you like detailed implementation guidance for any of these components?

best_practices: Start with clear success metrics and evaluation frameworks before building AI systems
Implement observability from day one with tracing, metrics, and logging
Use structured outputs and type safety to ensure reliable AI behavior
anti_patterns: Building proof-of-concept without considering production scalability
Skipping error handling and fallback strategies for AI service failures
Ignoring cost implications of LLM usage in production systems

faq.question: What vector databases does this skill support?
faq.answer: Supports Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate, Chroma, Milvus, and pgvector for vector storage and semantic search.

faq.question: Can this skill help with fine-tuning models?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on application development. For fine-tuning, it can guide on data preparation but recommends specialized ML engineering resources.

faq.question: Does this skill support local LLM deployment?
faq.answer: Yes, supports Ollama, vLLM, and TGI for local model deployment with guidance on optimization.

faq.question: How does this skill handle AI safety?
faq.answer: Provides guidance on prompt injection detection, PII redaction, content moderation, and responsible AI practices.

faq.question: Can this skill integrate with my existing codebase?
faq.answer: Yes, provides integration guidance for REST APIs, GraphQL, webhooks, and enterprise systems like Slack and Salesforce.

faq.question: What agent frameworks are supported?
faq.answer: Supports LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, AutoGen, and OpenAI Assistants API for agent development.
